title: Product recall: Peugeot Landtrek
bodyText:
NATIONAL NEWS - The National Consumer Commission informs consumers about the product recall of Peugeot Landtrek as notified by Stellantis South Africa (Pty) Ltd (Stellantis).

According to Stellantis, the affected vehicles may experience wear of the doorsill wiring harness caused by interference with the doorsill cover.


> In a worst-case scenario, this could result in unexpected airbag deployment without a collision.


The affected vehicles were made available nationwide from 2021 to 2025.

“This recall forms part of our ongoing efforts to ensure that products on the South African market are safe and compliant. We are working closely with Stellantis and other OEMs to ensure all affected vehicles are accounted for and that corrective measures are implemented swiftly. We encourage consumers to respond promptly and make the necessary arrangements with the authorised dealership”, said Acting Commissioner Mr Hardin Ratshisusu.

The necessary repairs or replacement will be at no cost to the consumer.

‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’
